sizing_rule.note: Geometric optimal portfolio sizing: weights determined when GHPROPT - 1 = RFR. Optimal f is implicit in portfolio weight derivation. Constraint-based allocation (e.g., 4 systems × 3 = 12 units). No explicit f value or risk percentage provided by author.

source_rule_text: The geometric optimal portfolio is equivalent to the portfolio tangent to the Capital Market Line only when the geometric average HPR of the optimal portfolio minus 1 equals the risk-free rate.
